overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of an armored character exploring a foggy, rain-soaked wetland at night. The character holds a torch while walking through dense willow groves toward a distant ruined structure visible across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense willow grove with hanging branches

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through dense foggy vegetation while holding a lit torch

entered.detail: large willow tree with hanging branches silhouetted against fog
dense hanging willow branches overhead creating partial cover
tall wet grass and reeds swaying in the rain
large moss-covered boulders scattered in the vegetation

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dense, foggy grove of weeping willows at night. Rain falls steadily as the torch illuminates tall wet grass and mossy rocks. The willow branches hang low overhead, creating a semi-enclosed canopy that blocks most of the sky.

events.description: large ruined shipwreck structure becomes visible through the fog in the distance

agents.ego_description: moving through opening terrain toward a distant landmark visible through the mist

entered.detail: massive dark ruined structure resembling a shipwreck or collapsed building emerging from fog
silhouetted trees barely visible through the dense mist

segments.scene_description: The terrain opens up as the character leaves the dense willow grove behind. Through the fog, a massive ruined structure becomes visible in the distance. The rain continues to fall as the character approaches the shoreline, with the willow trees now visible only on the left side.

events.description: terrain transitions to shoreline with calm water visible to the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the water's edge toward wooden posts sticking out of the water

entered.detail: dark still water reflecting the foggy sky and torchlight
vertical wooden posts sticking out of the water in a line
large boulder marking the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the shoreline where calm water stretches out to the right. Wooden pilings emerge from the water in the distance, and the ruined structure remains visible across the water. The path continues along the water's edge through sparse vegetation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic willow grove that gradually opens into a wide, rain-soaked shoreline. It begins beneath a dense canopy of weeping willow branches, where a torch illuminates tall wet grass and mossy rocks amidst a steady downpour. As the character moves forward, the enclosed grove gives way to a more open terrain, revealing a massive ruined structure looming through the fog in the distance. The scene then shifts toward the water's edge, with the willow trees receding to the left as the camera reaches a shoreline of calm water. Finally, the path continues along the coast past sparse vegetation and distant wooden pilings, keeping the ruined structure centered across the expanse of water.
